name: x402 Paywall Kit
shortDescription: Let your AI agent pay x402 crypto paywalls automatically. Plus Express.js middleware to add USDC paywalls to your own APIs in <10 lines.
features: Agent skill — auto-detect and pay x402 paywalls with policy controls
Express middleware — add USDC paywalls to any route in minutes
Policy engine — spending limits, domain filtering, daily caps
Payment logging — JSONL audit trail for every transaction
Demo app — working example on Base Sepolia testnet
